outcome.text:
33.8.11 *Dianthus* (Tafel 112: 6–12)

Opercula kronvormig of met verdikt, gesloten of onderbroken rand; PK 31–67 µm, 8–19 poriën (Tafel 112: 6–12).

Exine (2,5)3–4(4,5) µm; tectum met microechini tot ca. 1 µm; columellae netzig, mazen (1,5)2,5–5,0(6,0) µm.

*Dianthus alpinus* L. (2)
37,0–47,8 µm, MiW 43,2 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Dianthus arenarius* L. (2)
48,0–60,3 µm, MiW 54,5 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Dianthus armeria* L. (3)
40,0–49,8 µm, MiW 45,1 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Dianthus carthusianorum* L. (4)
37,5–46,3 µm, MiW 42,3 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Dianthus caryophylleus* L. (1)
50,0–66,5 µm, MiW 58,8 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Dianthus collinus* WALDST. & KIT. (1)
45,0–55,3 µm, MiW 50,4 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Dianthus deltoides* L. (2)
35,0–47,3 µm, MiW 40,7 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Dianthus ferrugineus* MILLER (1)
45,5–58,0 µm, MiW 51,2 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Dianthus glacialis* L. (1)
37,0–45,5 µm, MiW 41,7 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Dianthus gratianopolitanus* VILL. (1)
47,0–63,0 µm, MiW 52,9 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Dianthus monspessulanus* L. (1)
46,8–59,5 µm, MiW 52,9 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Dianthus neglectus* LOISEL. (1)
31,3–47,0 µm, MiW 41,5 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Dianthus plumarius* L. (1)
52,0–64,5 µm, MiW 57,6 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Dianthus plumarius L.* subsp. tergestinus (REICHENB.) KERNER (1)
42,0–54,3 µm, MiW 46,6 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Dianthus pontederae* KERNER (1)
37,3–49,0 µm, MiW 42,9 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Dianthus seguieri* VILL. (2)
41,0–53,8 µm, MiW 46,2 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Dianthus serotinus* WALDST. & KIT. (1)
50,5–64,5 µm, MiW 56,2 µm; 50 PK, Oa

Kleinarten / syn.: *Dianthus liburnicus* BARTL. bij *D. ferrugineus*; *D. sternbergii* SIEBER bij *D. monspessulanus*.
